overview: T4Men provides testosterone replacement therapy to men age 30 and older, using blood testing to assess testosterone levels and customized treatment plans. Treatment typically involves weekly or bi-weekly testosterone injections with follow-up blood tests every 4-6 weeks to maintain dosage.
highlights: Blood testing with results within 24 hours
Also offers GLP-1 weight-loss program (Skinny Shot)
targetAudience: Men age 30 and older seeking testosterone replacement therapy.
